name: Baked Cod with Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1 whole cod head, fin, and tail removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the stuffing by mixing bread crumbs, mashed potato, onion, celery, savoury seasoning (if using), and butter together until well combined. The mixture should form a ball that can be stuffed into the cod.
2. Remove the bone from the whole cod, ensuring the head, tail, and fins are removed.
3. Stuff the interior of the cod with the prepared stuffing.
4. Secure the cod with twine to keep the stuffing inside.
5. Place salt pork fat back on top of the cod.
6. Bake the cod at 350°F for one hour or until the salt pork is brown and crunchy.
Note: Bacon can be substituted for the salt pork, but it is preferred with this recipe. Enjoy!
